name: Halloween 1ct Bat Table Cover - Spritz™
description: Bring a touch of casual elegance to your gatherings with the Halloween 1ct Bat Table Cover - Spritz™. Made from polyethylene, this rectangular table cover adds an additional layer to your table, which protects it from spills, messes and stains. Featuring bat prints against a white backdrop, this table cover blends with a variety of Halloween decor themes and styles, making it perfect for gatherings or casual get-togethers.
